array.string: cd /Users/doyopc/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon || exit 1; source .venv/bin/activate || exit 1; export PYTHONPATH=/Users/doyopc/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon; export OCLAW_DB_PATH=/Users/doyopc/AI/openclaw-factory/data/openclaw.db; exec python -u bots/router_reply_finisher_v1.py >> logs/router_reply_finisher_v1.out 2>> logs/router_reply_finisher_v1.err
